title: Tesla Motors Australia Pty Ltd — Public safety
investigation_objective: Tesla Motors Australia Pty Ltd paid $155,460 after the ACCC issued ten infringement notices for allegedly failing to conduct required safety testing and provide mandatory button-battery warnings on three key fob models and two illuminated door-sill light models, covering 952 units sold between June 2022 and May 2023.
scope: Paid $155,460 over ten ACCC infringement notices for failing to safety-test and warn on button-battery-containing accessories
